item.title: Broken glass on pavement, 18th April
item.description:
Broken glass all over footpath. It's a busy footpath used my pedestrians and dogs so really could do with being cleaned up ASAP please.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Place Farm Avenue, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Left by flowerbed over week now blocking pavement falling on cars, 18th April
item.description:
Bike infront flowerbed by flats 26 godstow road 2nd time reported today was leaning on my car if any damage to car from now on 2 nd report will hold council responsible for not removing it

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Godstow Road, Thamesmead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 52 Lady Margaret Road, 18th April
item.description:
Light 7 stays on 24 hours a day
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 52, Lady Margaret Road, Tufnell Park, Greater London

item.title: Telecom Cabinet, Doors wide Open, cannot close. Hazard for pedestrians, 18th April
item.description:
This has been like this for at least 5 years and yet none of the Telecom companies have come to fix it. It's very dangerous, doors are always open, all wires exposed. A busy pedestrian foot fall area. Specifically Hazardous to elderly and small children.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stamford Hill, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
Side of Brimtonroy Tenants and Residents hall Remove graffiti from cable box

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2-32, Clifton Way, Peckham, Greater London

item.title: Graffiti, 18th April
item.description:
Outside Brimtonroy Tenanrs And residents association hall. Remove graffito from cable box

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2-32, Clifton Way, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Massive Lip between paving stone and tarmac resulted in serious fall, 18th April
item.description:
On the corner of Cheriton Avenue and Hayesford Park Drive there is a section of tarmac adjacent to paving stones. There is a considerable 'lip' between the level of the paving stones and the tarmac; the tarmac is considerably raised in comparison to the paving stones. This presents danger when attempting to move between the paving stones and the tarmac and is visually challenging to identify so footpath users may not identify the risk. The attached photo includes a shoe for scale and aims to show the considerable difference in height between the level of the paving stone and the level of the tarmac. The photo was shot almost at ground level as a fair measure. Recently, a family member did not see the 'lip' and tripped on the edge of the tarmac, resulting in a serious fall with treatment required at an NHS walk in centre. This is extremely dangerous and this would be further heightened at night, during inclement weather, for pedestrians with visual or mobility issues, etc. Please inspect and resolve this issue before there are any further accidents.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hayesford Park Drive, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 14, Millfields Cottages, Poverest, Greater London

item.title: Broken swing- rough metal on legs, 18th April
item.description:
The swing has come apart at one of the joins which is where the children’s legs would be. It is very sharp and grazed my child’s leg getting in before we realised what the issue was. Needs taking away and replacing urgently

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Eynsford Close, Crofton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Newport Place, Chinatown, City of Westminster

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Clapham Park Road, Clapham, Greater London
